data.title: When Will Altcoin Season Begin After Bitcoin Price Hit ATH Above $111,000?
data.description:
Crypto analyst Astronomer has provided insights into when the altcoin season will likely begin following the Bitcoin price’s rally to a new all-time high (ATH). His analysis indicated that BTC’s dominance is about to top, which will pave the way for altcoins to outperform the flagship crypto. Altcoin Season To Begin Soon As Bitcoin Price Hits New ATH In an X post, Astronomer predicted that the altcoin season is imminent, seeing as BTC’s dominance (BTC. D) has hit 65% following the Bitcoin price rally to a new ATH
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/when-altcoin-season-begins/

data.title: Stablecoin issuer Stablecorp completes $1.8 million in financing, with Coinbase Ventures and others participating
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Canadian stablecoin issuer Stablecorp has completed a $1.8 million financing, with investors including Coinbase Ventures and Side Door Ventures.
The funds will be used to expand the infrastructure construction of the Canadian dollar stablecoin QCAD, including the establishment of on-chain foreign exchange liquidity and payment channel integration. (Betakit)

data.title: A whale liquidated TRUMP and FARTCOIN and made a profit of $200,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, two days ago, the whale "2WfeaM" spent $2 million to buy TRUMP, and spent another $2 million to buy FARTCOIN.
10 minutes ago, the whale sold all TRUMP and FARTCOIN, with a total profit of $200,000. Profit of $368,500 on FARTCOIN, but loss of $168,600 on TRUMP.

data.title: Alchemy acquires code-free NFT startup HeyMint, completing its second acquisition this month
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Alchemy announced the acquisition of HeyMint, a California-based NFT startup platform, for an undisclosed amount. The acquisition aims to enhance Alchemy's smart wallet infrastructure and simplify the user onboarding process for Web3 applications. Flor Ronsmans De Vry, co-founder and CTO of HeyMint, will join Alchemy.
HeyMint attracted more than 1 million users in its first two years of operation, facilitated $38 million in NFT sales, and supported Web3 projects for major brands such as The Sandbox, Universal Music Group, and Ubisoft. This acquisition is Alchemy's second deal this month, following its acquisition of Dexter Lab, a real-time data infrastructure provider for the Solana ecosystem. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Ukraine and U.S. Launch Reconstruction Investment Fund Agreement
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Ukraine and the United States have officially launched the Ukraine-U.S. Reconstruction Investment Fund Agreement. Ukrainian media report that this initiative marks a new phase in Ukraine's post-war economic recovery. On the same day, U.S. Chargé d'Affaires in Ukraine, Julie Davis, delivered a diplomatic note to Ukraine's First Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Economy, Yuliia Svyrydenko, completing the necessary procedures.

On May 12, local time, the Ukrainian President's website announced that President Volodymyr Zelensky had signed the law approving the establishment of the Ukraine-U.S. Reconstruction Investment Fund Agreement. Previously, on April 30, both the United States and Ukraine signed the agreement, which had been referred to as the 'Ukraine-U.S. Mineral Agreement' by various parties.

data.title: Bitcoin price drops 4% as Trump EU tariff talk liquidates over $300M
data.description:
Key points:Bitcoin joins risk assets in a knee-jerk reaction to the latest instalment of the US trade war, this time focused on the EU. BTC price action dives up to 4% before recovering with $110,000 now a resistance level. Traders demand that price holds higher levels going forward to protect bullish momentum. Bitcoin (BTC) saw flash volatility into the May 23 Wall Street open as news headlines liquidated longs
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-price-drops-4-trump-eu-tariff-talk-liquidates-over-300m?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: TokenFi launches regulatory-compliant RWA tokenization platform
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News TokenFi, a tokenization project under the Floki ecosystem, officially launched its highly anticipated RWA platform. The platform is designed to help companies more conveniently put physical and financial assets on the chain in a fully compliant manner. The new module went live on May 23, providing a code-free platform for companies to create and issue regulated, RWA-backed tokens. These tokens are built on the ERC-3643 standard, embedding compliance capabilities directly into the tokens themselves. The core of the platform is to bind token ownership to verified investor identities to ensure that only qualified investors can hold or trade tokens. The platform is compatible with all EVM blockchains and is suitable for the tokenization of assets such as equity, real estate, commodities and intellectual property. (Cointelegraph)
